tools.name: generate_embeddings
tools.description: Generate vector embeddings for one or more texts using Cloudflare Workers AI (bge-base-en-v1.5, 768-dim).

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Rank a list of documents against a query using cosine similarity of bge embeddings. Returns top-k matches with scores.

tools.name: compute_similarity
tools.description: Compute cosine similarity between two texts. Returns score in [-1,1]. Useful for dedup and relatedness.
